name: Cala de Biniancolla
description: A small, traditional cove of around 100 metres between Punta Prima and Binibeca, with fishermen's huts, a gently shelving seabed and rocky cliffs that lend it privacy. Quiet, with a local feel.

highlights: the calm swim in water that deepens little by little (good for children)
rice and fish right by the cove at En Caragol
